allow: Bash(powershell -Command "$p = netstat -ano | findstr :3003 | findstr LISTENING | ForEach-Object { $_Split\('' ''\)[-1] }; if \($p\) { taskkill /F /PID $p }")
Bash(powershell -Command "$processes = Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($processes\) { $processes | Stop-Process -Force }")
Bash(powershell -Command "$processes = Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($processes.Count -gt 0\) { $processes | Stop-Process -Force }")

Bash(powershell -Command "$response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ''http://localhost:3000'' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host ''HTTP Status Code: '' $response.StatusCode; Write-Host ''Response Length: '' $response.Content.Length '' bytes''")

Bash(powershell -Command "$response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ''http://localhost:3000'' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host ''HTTP Status Code:'' $response.StatusCode; Write-Host ''Response Length:'' $response.Content.Length ''bytes''")

Bash(powershell -Command "$ports = @\(3000, 3001, 3002, 3003, 3004, 3005\); foreach \($port in $ports\) { $pids = netstat -ano | findstr :$port | findstr LISTENING | ForEach-Object { $_Split\('' ''\)[-1] }; if \($pids\) { foreach \($pid in $pids\) { taskkill /F /PID $pid } } }")

Bash(powershell -Command "$ports = @\(3000, 3001, 3002, 3003, 3004, 3005\); foreach \($port in $ports\) { $pids = \(netstat -ano | findstr :$port | findstr LISTENING\) | ForEach-Object { $_Split\('' ''\)[-1] }; if \($pids\) { foreach \($pid in $pids\) { taskkill /F /PID $pid } } }")
Bash(git commit -m "feat: 微信图标不需要点击链接")
Bash(git commit -m "chore: 更新 .claude/settings.local.json 文件")
Bash(powershell -Command "$p = netstat -ano | findstr :3003 | findstr LISTENING | ForEach-Object { $_-split '' '' | Where-Object { $_} | Select-Object -Last 1 }; if \($p\) { taskkill /F /PID $p }")

Bash(powershell -Command "$pids = netstat -ano | findstr :3003 | findstr LISTENING | ForEach-Object { $_-split '' '' | Where-Object { $_} | Select-Object -Last 1 }; if \($pids\) { $pids | ForEach-Object { taskkill /F /PID $_} }")

Bash(powershell -Command "$pids = netstat -ano | findstr :3001 | findstr LISTENING | ForEach-Object { $_-split '' '' | Where-Object { $_} | Select-Object -Last 1 }; if \($pids\) { foreach \($pid in $pids\) { taskkill /F /PID $pid } }")
Bash(powershell -Command "& { $pids = \(netstat -ano | findstr :3001 | findstr LISTENING\) -split '' '' | Where-Object { $_}; if \($pids\) { $pids | ForEach-Object { taskkill /F /PID $_} } }")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -like ""300*"" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } catch { } }')
